items.title: Tech Can't Stop These Threats — Your People Can
items.summary: Security controls can do only so much. Here are four attacks where your employees are usually your first, and only, line of cyber defense.

items.title: FCC Softens Ban on Foreign-Made Routers
items.summary: The Federal Communications Commission eased some restrictions and pushed back deadlines for foreign router manufacturers, but the ban is still in place.

items.summary: The privilege escalation vulnerability, which is similar to other Linux flaws like Copy Fail and Dirty Pipe, may already be under limited exploitation.
